input.idea: A terminal UI (TUI) Tetris clone. Single-player, keyboard-controlled, retro ASCII aesthetic. Cross-platform (macOS + Linux, Windows via WSL is fine). Language choice open but prefer something with a good TUI toolkit. Must support falling tetrominoes with SRS rotation, line clears with scoring, level/speed progression, score + high-score persistence to a local file, pause/resume, game-over and restart. Nice-to-haves (v1 stretch or v2): hold piece, next-piece preview, ghost piece, color themes, T-spin detection, 7-bag randomizer. Out of scope: multiplayer, net code, sound.
